mapper.select: SELECT id, image_id, video_id, video_desc, video_cover_url, video_play_url, digg_count, comment_count, share_count, collect_count, duration, create_time, update_time FROM bzh_image_video_relation WHERE image_id = #{imageId} ORDER BY digg_count DESC, create_time DESC

SELECT id, image_id, video_id, video_desc, video_cover_url, video_play_url, digg_count, comment_count, share_count, collect_count, duration, create_time, update_time FROM bzh_image_video_relation WHERE id IN
#{id}

SELECT id, image_id, video_id, video_desc, video_cover_url, video_play_url, digg_count, comment_count, share_count, collect_count, duration, create_time, update_time FROM bzh_image_video_relation WHERE id = #{id}
